hero.title: Technical Architect / Fullstack Engineer
hero.tagline: Designing scalable systems, building reliable products.
hero.summary: Technical Architect with 10+ years across enterprise backend, rich web platforms, mobile delivery, cloud infrastructure, and engineering leadership for multi-team product environments.

about.headline: From product discovery to platform scale, I bridge architecture decisions with practical delivery.
about.description: I specialize in designing cloud-ready architectures and leading fullstack delivery across backend services, frontend platforms, mobile applications, databases, observability, and DevOps automation. My focus is aligning system design with business goals, reliability, performance, and team velocity.
focusAreas: System design for scalable and resilient platforms
Backend and integration architecture across .NET, Java, PHP, and Node.js
Frontend and mobile experience delivery with React, Vue, and React Native
Database optimization, caching, asynchronous processing, and cloud-native operations
